content.sentence_text: The surface was smoo'th' to reduce friction during operation.
The algori'th'm was designed to improve data processing speed.
Protective lea'th'er gloves were issued to operators for heat resistance.
The control unit was wea'th'erproofed to prevent moisture damage.

activity_2_e.text:
Listen and speak the missing line during the pause and check your answer.
සංවාදයට සවන් දෙන්න, විරාමයක් පවතින විට අඩුව පවතින වාක්‍යය පවසන්න, ඉන්පසු ඔබේ පිළිතුර පරීක්ෂා කර බලන්න.
ஒலிப்பதிவைக் கவனிக்கவும், இடைவேளையின் போது விடுபட்ட வசனத்தைச் சொல்லவும், பின்னர் உங்கள் பதிலைச் சரிபார்க்கவும்.

tables: Active Voice
Passive Voice
He delivered the letters yesterday.
The letters were delivered yesterday.
The trainees rearranged the kitchen cupboards last week.
The kitchen cupboards  were rearranged last week.
They painted the building last year.
The building was painted last year.

example_dialogues.text_a: This is a very modern lathe machine.
example_dialogues.text_d: I am not sure. I think it was installed last year.

example_dialogues.text_a: This is a very heavy surface grinder.
example_dialogues.text_d: I am not sure. I think it was calibrated in 2020.

example_dialogues.text_a: This is a very long steel shaft.
example_dialogues.text_d: I am not sure. I think it was machined two weeks ago.

dialogues.text_a: This is a very thick metal plate.
dialogues.text_d: I am not sure. I think it was cut yesterday.

dialogues.text_a: This is a very powerful hydraulic press.
dialogues.text_d: I am not sure. I think it was commissioned in 2021.

dialogues.text_a: This is a very sharp cutting tool.
dialogues.text_d: I am not sure. I think it was replaced last month.

dialogues.text_a: This is a very large tool cabinet.
dialogues.text_d: I am not sure. I think it was delivered three months ago.

dialogues.text_a: This is a very solid bench vice.
dialogues.text_d: I am not sure. I think it was repaired last week.

dialogues.text_a: This is a very precise digital micrometre.
dialogues.text_d: I am not sure. I think it was manufactured in June 2023.

activity_a.text:
Choose the correct answer.
 නිවැරදි පිළිතුර තෝරන්න.
 சரியான பதிலைத் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கவும்.

activity_b.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_a.subtitle:
How to construct the Passive Voice.
The active object becomes the passive subject.
Simple Present: am/is/are + past participle
Simple past: was/were + past participle.
tables: Active: Simple Present
Passive: Simple Present
A small Italian company produces this olive oil.
This olive oil is produced by a small Italian company.
Many Sri Lankans speak English.
English is spoken by many Sri Lankans.
The students clean the kitchen counters thoroughly every day.
The kitchen counters are cleaned thoroughly by the students every day.
Active: Simple Past
Passive: Simple Past
The Swiss invented the watch.
The watch was invented by the Swiss.
Geoffrey Bawa designed the Sri Lankan Parliament Building in Kotte.
The Sri Lankan Parliament building was designed by Geoffrey Bawa.
The trainees repaired the broken benches.
The broken benches were repaired by the students.

content.question: People make chocolate from cocoa beans. Chocolate _______________ from cocoa beans.
Workers built this railway line in 1998. This railway line _______________ in 1998.
Farmers grow bananas in tropical countries. Bananas _______________ in tropical countries.
Technicians installed the new system last week. The new system _______________ last week.
Companies export tea worldwide. Tea _______________ worldwide.
Engineers completed this project in 2020. The project _______________ in 2020.
People speak English in many countries. English _______________ in many countries.
The chef prepared the meal yesterday. The meal _______________ yesterday.
Manufacturers produce laptops in large factories. Laptops _______________ in large factories.
Scientists discovered the vaccine in 2019. The vaccine _______________ in 2019.

activity_b.text: People make chocolate from cocoa beans. Chocolate is made from cocoa beans.
Workers built this railway line in 1998. This railway line was built in 1998.
Farmers grow bananas in tropical countries. Bananas are grown in tropical countries.
Technicians installed the new system last week. The new system was installed last week.
Companies export tea worldwide. Tea is exported worldwide.
Engineers completed this project in 2020. The project was completed in 2020.
People speak English in many countries. English is spoken in many countries.
The chef prepared the meal yesterday. The meal was prepared yesterday.
Manufacturers produce laptops in large factories. Laptops are produced in large factories.
Scientists discovered the vaccine in 2019. The vaccine was discovered in 2019.

activity_a.text:
Arrange the following into two categories.
පහත දැක්වෙන දෑ කාණ්ඩ දෙකකට වෙන් කර සකසන්න.
பின்வருவனவற்றை இரண்டு வகைகளாகப் பிரிக்கவும்.

activity_b.text:
Listen to the audio which will be played twice and click on the correct answer. It is very important that you read the questions before you listen to the recording.
ඔබට සෑම පටිගත කිරීමක්ම දෙවරක් ඇසෙනු ඇත. නිවැරදි පිළිතුර ක්ලික් කරන්න. රෙකෝඩින් එක අහන්නට පෙර ප්‍රශ්නය කියවීම ඉතාමත් වැදගත්ය.
ஒவ்வொரு ஒலிப்பதிவையும் நீங்கள் இருமுறை கேட்கலாம். கேட்ட எண்களை குறித்து எழுதுங்கள். பதிவைக் கேட்பதற்கு முன் கேள்விகளைப் படிப்பது மிகவும் முக்கியம்.

activity_d.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_e.text: Read along. පිටපත සමඟ කියවන්න. ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

content.item_a: The industry supports thousands of workers
The colour of the leaves changes
Sri Lankan tea is widely recognised

Questions.question: What part of the tea plant is selected during plucking?
Questions.answer: The top two leaves and one bud
options: The top two leaves and several buds
The top two leaves and one bud
The top three leaves and one bud

Questions.question: What happens during the withering stage?
Questions.answer: Moisture is gradually removed as air circulates.
options: Moisture is increased, and leaves are dried completely with heat.
Moisture is gradually removed as air circulates.
Natural juices are released from the leaves.

Questions.question: Why are the leaves rolled by machines?
Questions.answer: To release the natural juices inside the leaves.
options: To reduce the moisture content inside the leaves.
To soften the leaves before packing.
To release the natural juices inside the leaves.

Questions.question: What is done before the tea is shipped overseas?
Questions.answer: Samples are tested to ensure quality standards are met.
options: The tea is packed and immediately transported to ships.
Samples are tested to ensure quality standards are met.
The tea is labelled after it is loaded onto ships.

Questions.question: Why is Sri Lankan tea recognised internationally?
Questions.answer: Because of the careful production process and strict quality control.
options: Because of the careful production process and strict quality control.
Because of skillful marketing and strict quality control.

activity_c.text: Today, you will learn how tea is made in Sri Lanka and how it is prepared for export around the world.
First, tea leaves are carefully plucked by hand.
After harvesting, the leaves are quickly transported to the factory to preserve freshness.
This stage is called withering, and moisture is removed from the leaves as air is circulated.
During this stage, the colour of the leaves changes and the flavour develops.
Once the desired level is reached, the leaves are dried with heat.
Finally, they are sorted, graded, and packed after strict quality checks are carried out.
After processing, the tea is prepared for international markets.
Detailed labels are attached, and export documents are completed.
Before shipment, samples are tested to ensure that quality standards are met.
The tea is then transported to the Colombo port, where it is loaded onto ships and sent to countries across Europe, Asia, and the Middle East.
It is served in homes, hotels, and restaurants around the world.
In many countries, it is sold under the name “Ceylon Tea”, which is a protected and respected brand.

First, tea leaves are carefully plucked by hand.
After harvesting, the leaves are quickly transported to the factory to preserve freshness.

During this stage, the colour of the leaves changes and the flavour develops.

After processing, the tea is prepared for international markets.

The tea is then transported to the Colombo port, where it is loaded onto ships and sent to countries across Europe, Asia, and the Middle East.
It is served in homes, hotels, and restaurants around the world.
In many countries, it is sold under the name “Ceylon Tea”, which is a protected and respected brand.

First, tea leaves are carefully plucked by hand.
After harvesting, the leaves are quickly transported to the factory to preserve freshness.
This stage is called withering, and moisture is removed from the leaves as air is circulated.
During this stage, the colour of the leaves changes and the flavour develops.
Once the desired level is reached, the leaves are dried with heat.
Finally, they are sorted, graded, and packed after strict quality checks are carried out.
After processing, the tea is prepared for international markets.
Detailed labels are attached, and export documents are completed.
Before shipment, samples are tested to ensure that quality standards are met.
The tea is then transported to the Colombo port, where it is loaded onto ships and sent to countries across Europe, Asia, and the Middle East.
It is served in homes, hotels, and restaurants around the world.
In many countries, it is sold under the name “Ceylon Tea”, which is a protected and respected brand.

instrction_a.text:
Watch this video to help you better understand today’s lesson.
අද පාඩම හොඳින් අවබෝධ කර ගැනීමට මෙම වීඩියෝව බලන්න.
இன்றைய பாடத்தை நன்றாக புரிந்துகொள்ள இந்த வீடியோவைப் பாருங்கள்.

instruction_b.text:
These steps will help you to learn English from this video.
මෙම වීඩියෝවෙන් ඉංග්‍රීසි ඉගෙන ගැනීමට මෙම පියවර ඔබට උපකාරී වනු ඇත.
இந்த வீடியோவிலிருந்து ஆங்கிலம் கற்க இந்த படிகள் உங்களுக்கு உதவும்.
steps:

கூகுள் ட்ரான்ஸ்லேட் பயன்படுத்தி புதிய சொற்களைக் கற்றுக்கொள்ளுங்கள்.

கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.
